## Description
Describe why this component patch was made and what it does.

## Related Jira Ticket(s)
Link or list the Jira ticket(s) that this PR addresses.

## How has this been tested?
Describe how you have tested these changes (e.g., unit tests, manual checks).

## Checklist
- [ ] README.md (top-level) is updated with component patch description, P1AS version(s) targeted
- [ ] Is there a Jira ticket for each version of P1AS this component is supposed to be used with?
- [ ] Is there a Jira ticket that addresses this component patch permanently in the P1AS release?
- [ ] Was this component patch tested against the target version of P1AS it is intended to modify?
